title: ETH falls to 13-month low on Zcash bug news and Bitcoin drop to sub-$60K: Is $1.4K next?
summary: ETH price crashed below $1,600 as a vulnerability in Zcash emerged and Bitcoin sold off below $60,000 for the first time in months.

title: Travala lets AI agents book hotels with USDC on Base
summary: Travala’s new protocol lets AI agents search and book hotels with USDC on Base, but travelers still approve the final payment.

title: Raizen Inks $13 Billion Out-of-Court Deal With Creditors
summary: Raizen SA reached an out-of-court restructuring agreement with the majority of its creditors, according to a regulatory filing, marking a key step in the Brazilian sugar-and-ethanol producer’s efforts to rework its debt.

title: Zcash Bug Crisis Shows Privacy Cuts Both Ways, Experts Say
summary: Fallout from a bug that enabled undetectable Zcash counterfeiting shows that privacy can sometimes present tradeoffs, experts say.

title: Strategy Shares Fall to 4-Month Low as STRC Dips and Bitcoin Sinks Under $60K
summary: Strategy shares tumbled alongside Bitcoin on Friday as the firm's flagship preferred stock also came under pressure.

title: Hyperliquid treasuries stand alone in profit as legacy crypto DATs bleed billions
summary: Strategy, Bitmine, and other major treasury firms have seen paper gains evaporate as crypto prices continue sliding.

title: Next up, taxes: Crypto tax legislation circulated ahead of House Ways and Means Committee hearing next week
summary: As cryptocurrency-related bills from regulating stablecoins to the market as a whole take center stage — now comes how to tax those assets.

title: Oil tanker owners fear market crash after Iran war drove record profits
summary: Shipowners ploughed windfall into new vessels and are braced for steep drop in rates if Strait of Hormuz reopens

title: US and Iran exchange strikes in new threat to shaky ceasefire
summary: Kuwait and Bahrain are attacked as American forces intercept drones launched over Strait of Hormuz
